message:
fix: resolve nightly test suite failures (#3626, #3627, #3628, #3630) (#3641)

- Unit test: add mockResponse helper with .text() to match fetchAPI's
  response.text() + JSON.parse() pattern (fixes all 14 failing tests)
- Consistency test: extract magic numbers in WorkloadDeployment.tsx to
  named constants, guard .join() call in ClusterAssignmentPanel.tsx
- Benchmark test: parse response defensively to handle non-JSON replies
  from the nightly-e2e/runs API endpoint
- Gosec/dependency-audit: already passing on current main

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
